programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger. When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one. Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: America's Most Musical Family
programme.desc: The first five family bands take the stage to perform for celebrity judges Ciara, David Dobrik and Debbie Gibson.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patnocchio/ ChefBob
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince him to steal him a Krabby Patty. SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Paranoia/ Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous. SpongeBob introduces Patrick to the wonderful world of book learning.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Love Birds/ Rocket Men
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected. After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey, and everyone at Buffalo. Wilf's first run as flight attendant raises eyebrows among the staff.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: A landing gear collapse right on the runway sends everyone scrambling. Everything goes wrong trying to get a frozen DC4 airborne.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Lock
programme.desc: Devan runs into gear problems when he ferries a mothballed DC3 across the country and a cold snap triggers problems at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Casualties of War
programme.desc: With winter's first blow, new recruit John must save a snow plow stuck in an icy river. While Jamie pushes further into new territory, changes rock the company, forcing Colin to take on a new role. The community says farewell to a Heavy Rescue legend.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Saved on Preacher's Corner
programme.desc: Jamie's new B.C. crew struggles with a mangled trailer on a blind corner. When Colin slips up on a big recovery in Alberta, Jamie's brother must take over the job, even though he's a rookie on the rotator; Brandon steps up to a new role.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: War Zone
programme.desc: When a lumber truck and diesel tanker collide, the flaming wreckage is the biggest recovery of Colin's career. As snowstorms pummel the Coquihalla, Al Quiring heads up the hill. In freezing rain, John faces off against a mangled tractor.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Holidays Thru Hell
programme.desc: A semi plows off a bridge, leaving a trailer and three RVs dangling over a raging river. John must get holiday traffic moving and prove himself on a multi-part recovery unlike anything they've faced.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: The Race To Survive
programme.desc: Caught in a savage storm, a day on a lake turns deadly. Tourists must escape an epic flash flood. The hunt for kids trapped in a flooded cave. A rockslide threatens tourists.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Wildfire and Whitewater
programme.desc: Winds whip up a deadly wildfire that torches a town. Ferocious ocean waves leave storm watchers stranded. White water rafters are pummeled by rain and rocks during a trip down the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Severe Weather Survivors
programme.desc: A microburst in Mexico brings down a plane while a rare tornado outbreak catches an entire town off guard.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Wind Whipped & Waterlogged

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Harvey Hammers Houston
programme.desc: As Hurricane Harvey hammers Houston, Texas, it becomes the most extreme rainfall event in US history. A local realtor heads out in his boat to rescue a woman and her family.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Twin Twisters
programme.desc: Two powerful tornadoes take aim at a Nebraska farming community at the same time. Bank employees take cover in a vault, while a mother and her daughter are buried in the rubble.

programme.title: Hoarders: Phyllis/ Janet
programme.desc: Phyllis' house is packed with a floor to ceiling collection of bags stuffed with dolls. Janet has to crawl over mountains of garbage to get to the one recliner where she eats and sleeps.

programme.title: Hoarders: Stacey/ Roi
programme.desc: Stacey has two days to get rid of the 47 dogs and cats that have taken over her house, or she may lose both her daughter and her home. Roi has been evicted from his home, as there are too many dangerous hazards there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mike/ Bonnie
programme.desc: Mike's house is so toxic that a virus she contracted in the home caused her kidneys to fail, nearly killing her. Bonnie's home is hoarded and in need of repair.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dorothy and David and Doris
programme.desc: Dorothy and David fell in love with each other over their mutual love of hoarding. Their home is so packed now it has become physically unsafe for Dorothy, and doctors have said one more fall in the hoard could paralyze her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ruby and Mary
programme.desc: Ruby's house is so hoarded she spends her entire day living in the car, and her grandson has started running the streets of LA.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Judy/ Jerry
programme.desc: Judy hoarded herself out of her house and used cancer surgery as an excuse to stay with a friend. Jerry hoarded himself out of a lovely half million-dollar property in a desirable neighbourhood.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.desc: In the season finale, Dr. Nassif helps a fellow Lebanese patient get the nose she wants in time for her wedding, Dr. Dubrow attempts to fix a woman's strip mall boob job, and Mama June from 'Honey Boo Boo' fame needs a fupa lift.

programme.title: Botched: A Revision Runs Through It
programme.desc: On the road in Montana, the doctors take a man-cation fly fishing and also check in on a woman who went headfirst into a chain link fence in a horrific motorcycle accident. Plus, a woman recovering from a 'mommy breakover' urgently needs help.

programme.title: Botched: Welcome to Jurassic Schnoz
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps an eating disorder survivor feel beautiful in her own skin by downsizing her breasts, while Dr. Nassif sends a 'dinosaur' nose back to the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Essentials
programme.desc: The pumpkin spice phenomenon hits the Holiday Baking Championship. For the pre-heat, nine bakers attempt to wow the judges with creative pumpkin spiciness. In the main heat, the bakers must combine a yule log with a classic holiday treat.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Plenty of Gratitude
programme.desc: For the pre-heat, the eight bakers work in teams to make four different kinds of pies. In the main heat, the bakers embrace the stuffed feeling after the Thanksgiving meal by making stuffed cakes featuring seasonal ingredients.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Turkey Day Delights
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, seven bakers must make a dessert combining cranberry with another flavour of the season. The main heat challenges the bakers to create a sweet treat that pairs coffee with an unusual flavour of coffee syrup.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Artistry
programme.desc: The holidays are a time for artistry and decorations, so for the pre-heat, inflatable holiday decorations inspire the six bakers' cute cream puff displays. In the main heat, the bakers dazzle the judges with delicious hand-painted eggnog cakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Light and Inspiring
programme.desc: The Festival of Lights ignites creativity in the pre-heat, when the five bakers have to update traditional rugelach with unexpected new flavors like cardamom, grapefruit, guava paste, peanut butter or chai.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: New Family Classics
programme.desc: The remaining four bakers are going cocoa-loco for the holiday season in the chocolaty pre-heat, when they have to combine common pantry ingredients like balsamic vinegar, potato chips, oatmeal, red wine, olive oil and more.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Gifts Of Greatness
programme.desc: Three bakers remain in the competition, and in the pre-heat, they have to create a beautiful edible holiday ornament display. For the final main heat, the bakers channel holiday gift shopping by creating a cake that is decorated like a gift.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Wholesome Harvest
programme.desc: After the busy holidays, Nancy Fuller and her husband, David, need to start the year off right, so Nancy's putting together a menu of light and fresh meals. To start off, she's whipping up a get up and go smoothie that packs a punch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Time To Pull The Curtain On Crepes
programme.desc: Bobby Flay loves crepes for brunch, and creates a variety of them including smoked salmon with ricotta, caper crepes with herb sauce, and ham and cheese egg crepes with mustard sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Sweet and Spicy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri doesn't love candy, so when his chef friends visit the ranch for Halloween, they know to mix heat with the sweet. Amanda Freitag starts off the meal with a red hot-blood orange margarita made with spicy cinnamon syrup.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: The Days Grow Shorter And The Nights Longer

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Old Friends, New Friends
programme.desc: Ree's throwing a welcome home dinner for friends moving back to her town.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Family Matters
programme.desc: To welcome Ree's father and stepmom to the ranch for dinner, Ladd's grilling the steaks, while Ree whips up all the fixings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Essential Cooking Tools
programme.desc: Ree finds some great tools at a local kitchen store to give as a wedding gift. As she purchases the tools, she shares some great dishes she can make with each.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Anniversary
programme.desc: It's Ree Drummond and her husband Ladd's anniversary, so to celebrate she's cooking a meal for the whole family. She prepares an Elway's wedge salad, prime rib for five and squaw bread with honey butter.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Molly's Baby Shower

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Birthday Boys
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is celebrating two birthdays on the farm: her husband, Nick, and his dad, Roger. She's making a lunch menu that features both of their favorites, starting with Nick's favorite chicken shawarma tacos served with a tasty Moroccan carrot salad.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Spicy
programme.desc: Some like it hot, and some like it spicy, so Ina Garten is making dishes to please both. She starts with an exotic lamb and chickpea curry made with a fragrant mix of spices, and her lobster corn fritters are paired with creamy sriracha sauce.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Chocolate
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares professional tips for chocolate, starting with an off-the-scale delicious chocolate ganache cake, complete with a chevron frosting tutorial. Then, chocolate crème brulee is taken to dazzling new dessert heights.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Bounty of Fall Flavors
programme.desc: Celebrate fall's finest flavors starting with Geoffrey Zakarian's Fall Stout Pot Roast with Autumn Vegetables. Next, we break down the basics of the season's heartiest greens and Sunny Anderson makes her Sausage Creamed Collards.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels

programme.desc: Police must sift through puzzling evidence and misleading accounts in order to solve a young girl's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: On November 7, 2014, 69-year old Ina Clare Richardson is found brutally murdered in a public park in Clarkston, Washington. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras to piece together the puzzle of her fateful final night.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: On October 1st, 2009, 37-year-old Natasha Cournoyer disappears without a trace in Laval, Canada. As her friends and family struggle for answers, detectives must follow a stone-cold trail to uncover her final footsteps caught on surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Black Hat
programme.desc: On April 14, 2009, 25-year old student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in an upmarket hotel room in Boston. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area and quickly unravel a serial attacker.

programme.title: See No Evil: Call Me Back, Chris
programme.desc: In February 2008, Christopher Duncan left his apartment in San Antonio Texas, never to return again. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage has the potential to reveal the identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Life After Midnight
programme.desc: In February 2015, the body of 26-year-old Celina Petersen is found dumped in an alley in South Park, Seattle. When police recover surveillance footage from across the neighborhood, they begin to unravel the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.desc: A man cleaning out his basement finds a forgotten masterpiece left behind by a distant uncle.

programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: A man's life begins to fall apart as he deals with a divorce and managing his children. After meeting and befriending a young bachelor he learns how to navigate the single life.

programme.title: Watchmen
programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.desc: A grandfather suffering from Alzheimer's disease puts a strain on his son's marriage with his deteriorating condition, but his granddaughter is determined to help him. Without telling her parents, she runs off with her grandfather to Venice.

programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.desc: After a horrific attack leaves him broken and with no memories, Mark Hogancamp copes with his painful and confusing life by building a miniature replica of a World War II village, complete with resident dolls that resemble himself and his friends.

programme.title: Movie: The Rundown
programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.title: Any One of Us
programme.desc: This film chronicles pro mountain biker Paul Basagoitia's life-changing journey to recovery after suffering a spinal cord injury.

programme.title: Movie: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Ray, a working father of two, struggles to save his family when aliens invade Earth with the aim of destroying it. Ray comes to the defence of his children as the world deals with a force it has never known.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Ever Forgive Me?
programme.desc: After her style of writing falls out of favour, a biographer finds herself broke and out of work. She beings forging letters by famous people and selling them, but when potential buyers begin to get suspicious she turns to stealing actual letters.

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Dame Helen Mirren stars as the legendary Russian empress in this premiere episode.

programme.title: Movie: Blindspotting
programme.desc: With only three days left on his probation, Collin is determined to avoid even a small hint of illegal activity, but with his unstable best friend Miles causing trouble the two end up on a collision course that could jeopardize Collin's freedom.

programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Last Letters Home: Voices of American Troops

programme.title: Movie: Kin

programme.title: Movie: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: When their mutual best friends die, two single adults find themselves named as guardians of their friend's orphaned daughter.

programme.title: Real Sports With Bryant Gumbel

programme.desc: A hitman returns home to do a little business and attend his high school reunion.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Shameless: The Fugees
programme.desc: Frank's business takes a turn for the worse, sending him on the run through the Great White North. Ian's run-in with a minister brings about some unexpected allies. Meanwhile, Fiona tries, and fails, to fit in with Ford's group of friends.

programme.title: Shameless: Church of Gay Jesus
programme.desc: Ian's fame in the LGBTQIA community explodes but the sudden surge of 'followers' may be more than he can handle; Frank, however, finds a way to cash in. Meanwhile, Fiona struggles with her conscience when she learns about a worker who fell off her roof.

programme.title: Shameless: A Gallagher Pedicure
programme.desc: Fiona's homeless tenants barricade themselves inside her apartment. Lip takes in a terrified Sierra and Lucas when her father is released from prison. Meanwhile, Ian, despite warnings, provides sanctuary to a runaway teen and Frank considers retirement.

programme.title: Shameless: Sleepwalking
programme.desc: Fiona taps deep into her Gallagher roots to get the homeless family out of her apartment and dismiss their lawsuit. An explosive incident sends Ian and some of his followers into hiding from the authorities. Lip works towards the life she really wants.

programme.title: Movie: Second Act
programme.desc: A talented but uneducated woman stuck in a low-paying job gets a call out of the blue for an interview with a well-paying company. After landing the job, she learns that it's due to a fake Facebook profile set up in her name that makes her look great.

programme.title: Celeste Barber: Challenge Accepted
programme.desc: Celeste Barber shares her secrets to love, friendship and family, while injecting some humor into everyday-situations.

programme.title: Desus & Mero: UN JOKKERSTEPPEN
programme.desc: Desus Nice and The Kid Mero sound off on pop culture, politics, sports and more with illustrious guest Bernie Sanders.

programme.title: The Affair
programme.desc: As wildfires threaten Los Angeles, Helen and Noah are forced to run for their lives and confront old wounds along the way.

programme.title: The Circus: Inside the Wildest Political Show on Earth: The Deep State
programme.desc: The Circus does a deep dive into the long-time federal government agencies and bureaucrats involved in Congress' ongoing impeachment inquiry, otherwise dubbed by President Trump as the 'deep state.'

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: Lauren and Sarah make a choice about their future. Alan and Evelyn find a path forward. Elaine and DeSean feel a shift. Orna feels the weight of her work, and marvels at how bizarre her profession is.

programme.title: Celeste Barber: Challenge Accepted
programme.desc: Celeste Barber shares her secrets to love, friendship and family, while injecting some humor into everyday-situations.

programme.desc: A successful romance novelist is nursed back to health and then held captive by a demented fan.

programme.title: Martin: The Parents Are Coming
programme.desc: Gina wants Martin to meet her conservative parents, but Martin feels uneasy. Wanting to make a good first impression, he takes advice from Tommy and Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Three Men and a Mouse
programme.desc: When Gina is at Martin's house sleeping, she hears noises in the middle of the night. Thinking it's a robber, she begs Martin to check it out. Martin discovers that it's a mouse.

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery
programme.desc: When Martin's neighbor is robbed, Martin holds a neighborhood crime watch meeting.

programme.title: Martin: Baby It's Cole'd Here
programme.desc: Cole's mother interrupts his evening with his girlfriend and demands back rent from him.

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days
programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and his friends gather at his apartment to share ghost stories.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Ol' Ball and Chain
programme.desc: On the day of Jazz's wedding, his bride-to-be makes sexual advances towards Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Will is stranded in a mountain forest with his new girlfriend's disagreeable father.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: M Is for the Many Things She Gave Me
programme.desc: When Philip's former college girlfriend comes to visit, she attempts to seduce Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mother's Day
programme.desc: When Jazz and his wife try unsuccessfully to become pregnant, they ask for Will's help.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Papa's Got a Brand New Excuse
programme.desc: Philip and Vivian are unable to forgive Will's father for abandoning Will and his mother.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: For Sale by Owner
programme.desc: The Banks family is offered a large sum of money by a client who wants to buy their house.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: While vacationing in Will's hometown, the Banks family learns a secret about Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Client
programme.desc: Will discovers that Ashley has the gift of singing and pursues a music career for her.

programme.title: Movie: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: To impress his new girlfriend, Nick offers to drive her kids from Portland to Vancouver.

programme.title: Movie: Johnson Family Vacation
programme.desc: As the Johnsons head out on their annual family reunion, it becomes a question of survival as Nate Johnson fights with the onboard navigation system, while the rest of the family join the ride very reluctantly.

programme.title: Movie: Merry and Bright
programme.desc: Two people work together to make their candy-cane factory profitable, but in the end, it's their love that turns a profit.

programme.title: Movie: Reunited at Christmas
programme.desc: A novelist and her boyfriend head to her late grandmother's house for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: A woman heads home for the holidays, things get complicated and she is forced to work together with her ex for the towns annual scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: The author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his young niece and nephew for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town for Christmas and discovers that the town's historic general store has shut down. Using the skills she has as a retail designer, she is determined to bring the store back to life in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is hired to become a personal shopper for an uptight, corporate executive. As they work together, she teaches him that Christmas has less to do with the money that is spent, and more to do with the people in your life.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant is asked to stay for Christmas by a family after she returns a package left on a plane by a passenger and misses her connection back home.

programme.title: Movie: Coming Home for Christmas
programme.desc: While planning a final Christmas gala at the exquisite Ashford Estate, a house manager falls for the handsome executor of the estate.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Detour
programme.desc: Two NYC-bound travellers find themselves linked when a storm waylays their flight to an airport hotel in Buffalo. Desperate to get home in time for Christmas, a woman seeks help, in any form, to make a Christmas miracle happen.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Jane Seymour from 'The Kominsky Method' stops by. Then, actor Graham Phillips talks about 'The Little Mermaid Live!.' and 'Skillet Love' author Anne Byrn cooks a chicken pot pie skillet.

programme.title: Movie: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: A handsome bachelor sees his life change before his eyes when he adopts a stray cat.

programme.title: Movie: A Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: A woman hires a man to pretend to be her fiancé over the holidays, but she soon realizes that she is in over her head and has to face the music.

programme.title: Movie: Click
programme.desc: When a workaholic architect finds a truly universal remote, he discovers he can fast-forward and rewind to different parts of his life.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: Blended
programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, two single parents are horrified to learn that they're sharing a suite at a resort for families where they've taken their respective kids on holiday.

programme.desc: The latest in scientific testing reveals that some of the boys at South Park Elementary have a sex addiction problem.

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans

programme.title: South Park: The Hobbit
programme.desc: When Wendy tries to fix one of her girl friends up with Butters, she ends up in the counsellor’s office.

programme.title: South Park: Medicinal Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Cartman's favourite restaurant has been shut down and replaced by a store that sells medicinal marijuana. Randy is desperate to get a prescription card to buy pot and Cartman will do anything to get his beloved fried chicken back.

programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes of Jimmy Buffett's Escape to Margaritaville.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Lost and Found
programme.desc: A grandmother imparts wisdom and special holiday ornaments on her visiting granddaughter.

programme.title: Movie: My Dog's Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: A spoiled Maltese puppy has to share her mommy with her new boyfriend and his son.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Prince
programme.desc: A dedicated teacher returns home for Christmas, and this year, her diplomat boyfriend joins her. After discovering the boyfriend is actually a prince, her entire life is thrown upside down.

programme.title: Movie: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: Mrs. Claus feels neglected by her not-so-attentive husband and goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Cold Case Shocker
programme.desc: Newlywed Sherri Rasmussen was found shot to death inside her Van Nuys, California home. For more than two decades, police pursued the theory that she was killed in a burglary gone wrong, until DNA evidence points to a suspect with a personal motive.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Fatal Inheritance
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas. His young daughters find him bleeding on the stairs of their Ohio home. They didn’t know it then, but it is the first sign that something is very wrong.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: It's In Your Brain
programme.desc: Doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spent months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Cold Case Shocker
programme.desc: Newlywed Sherri Rasmussen was found shot to death inside her Van Nuys, California home. For more than two decades, police pursued the theory that she was killed in a burglary gone wrong, until DNA evidence points to a suspect with a personal motive.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Fatal Inheritance
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas. His young daughters find him bleeding on the stairs of their Ohio home. They didn’t know it then, but it is the first sign that something is very wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Bears Descend
programme.desc: In preparation for the spring cattle drive, Atz Lee, Otto and August survey the homestead for signs of bears and employ modern surveillance to track their movement. Eivin and Eve take the kids on a kelp-harvesting expedition and Atz Sr. goes bear hunting.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Boat Rescue Mission
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier Extras: The discovery of a capsized boat by Eve and Eivin leads to a hunt for survivors. Otto, Jane, and August are hard at work constructing a shelter for the calves, and Jane introduces a spring tradition for the family.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Greener Pastures
programme.desc: With predators stalking the homestead, the need for safe grazing land for cattle is greater than ever. Atz Sr and Atz Lee head to Perl Island to begin plans for new pasture, while Otto and Eivin set to work transporting a small herd to the island by boat.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Dead Men and Widows
programme.desc: Father and son jetboat captains take on Deadman's Rapids. As a storm bears down, scrambling to re-roof the barn, Pete takes a potentially catastrophic fall. Felling a massive dead tree puts Ron and Wes at risk from widow makers crashing from above.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Crimes Against Humanity
programme.desc: International criminal lawyer Patricia Viseur Sellers investigates the role of perpetrators in genocides and crimes against humanity, from leaders to followers, as well as those who resist the power of hate.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Hope
programme.desc: Neuroscientist Emile Bruneau explores how we can use our capacity for critical thinking, our brain plasticity, and strategies like education and cooperation to help combat hatred.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust
programme.desc: Down on the Mexican border, Game Wardens pull in an illegal gill net. A group caught trespassing is found with firearms and narcotics. In East Texas, Game Wardens question a man suspected of illegally hunting on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Trashed
programme.desc: In East Texas a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter Diaries: Africa's Final Frontier
programme.desc: Steve visits Namibia, the driest place on earth, to see the daily struggle for survival.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fluff and Feathers
programme.desc: A Pomeranian pup struggles to make friends until he meets some baby chicks his own size.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Cat Is a Bully
programme.desc: Gracie attacks Kristen and Lei daily as well as any of their friends that still dare set foot in their home.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Pomeranian Plot Twist
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne sees a surprise on an x-ray of one of his favorite patients, while Dr. Ross flexes his exotic vet chops with a fennec fox and a kinkajou with a highly contagious infection. Dr. Blue has his hands full with a former frat house pig named Aubie.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Nalla Fights Back
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff races to save a brave pit bull shot defending her owner during a robbery. Dr. Baier treats a guinea pig with an unusual problem. And Jeff and Hector head out to a wildlife sanctuary that needs their help with a couple of wolves.

programme.title: The Zoo: Love Shack
programme.desc: To help love bloom between two kiwis, zoo staff build an elaborate hut into which they introduce a pair of potential mates. When a king cobra arrives at the zoo, keepers have their hands full training him to move from the exhibit to a holding pen.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: New Arrival
programme.desc: The zoo's Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for two years and is reaching the end of her tether. It's Thi's fourth baby and after giving birth to a stillborn, the zoo is keeping a close eye on her.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Scarred
programme.desc: Sui, ready for more responsibility, tests herself by taking the lead in a rescue. An adopter looks for a dog that will feel at home around her many chickens and Tia rescues a pit bull with scars that reveal a painful past.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Jail Break
programme.desc: A challenge comes in the form of a stray dog stuck in the swamp, Tia takes in two sickly puppies from an overwhelmed owner, and one of Villalobos favourite residents finally finds a chance at a forever home.

programme.title: River Monsters: Cold Blooded Horror
programme.desc: The River Monsters in Japan are like no others Jeremy has ever encountered, from the devastating earthquake-causing catfish, the Namazu, to the sinister, child-snatching killer called the Kappa.

programme.title: Movie: Little Man
programme.desc: A family mistakenly adopts a vertically challenged criminal on the run from the police, not realizing he is a man and not a child.

programme.title: Movie: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: A bounty hunter and the con man he's pursuing stumble upon a multi-million dollar stash of diamonds. They are forced to team up in order to catch the criminal responsible.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.desc: Andi is forced to reconsider who is and isn't in her corner. Karen meets someone new and reconsiders the dating game. Sabrina's new love interest sparks some suspicion. Danni witnesses something that could break Andi's heart.

programme.desc: Lynn's brother comes to town and she unintentionally steals his thunder as a lead singer.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Kids Say the Darndest Things
programme.desc: Jabari begins to act out and runs away hoping to get his parents back together.

programme.desc: After Gina and Pam get promotions, Martin realizes his job is going nowhere.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Martin takes steps to ensure that he gets on Varnel Hill's talk show.

programme.title: Martin: Thanks for Nothing
programme.desc: Thanksgiving gets interesting when Martin's relatives and Gina's parents come to dinner.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Finn-ished
programme.desc: Lynn starts to have feelings after having a brief fling with her band mate.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Bridges of Fresno County
programme.desc: Toni suspects her mother is having an affair when she comes for a visit and acts strange.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Wedding on the Rocks
programme.desc: On the eve of Maya's nuptials, a drunken Darnell admits to Maya that he still loves her.

programme.title: Girlfriends: With a Twist
programme.desc: Maya admits that she still loves Darnell, but refuses to tell him or stop his wedding.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Fits & Starts
programme.desc: Maya and Darnell admit their true feelings for one another and head to Las Vegas.

programme.title: A Different World: Wild Child
programme.desc: Denise befriends Cougar, an extremely intelligent and creative student from her philosophy class. When Denise catches her using Whitley's room, Cougar reveals that she is homeless.

programme.title: A Different World: Dr. Cupid
programme.desc: Dwayne tries to use his radio show to get a Valentine's Day date. He invents a dream man named Darrell Walker in the hopes of eliciting attention from the ladies.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Just Say Yo
programme.desc: During their high school prom, Will accidentally gives Carlton an overdose of drugs.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Baby Comes Out
programme.desc: When Vivian finally goes into labour, no one is home to drive her to the hospital.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part One)
programme.desc: Gina is offered a job in New York and Martin, taking advice from Stan, tells her to take it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)
programme.desc: With Gina out of his life, Martin reconsiders his decision to let her go to New York to move on with her life, and he sets out to win her back.

programme.title: Martin: Arms Are for Hugging
programme.desc: Martin and Gina admit that they are fighting and arguing too much, so they seek the help of a church Minister for counselling.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill
programme.desc: After winning a charity boxing match, Martin thinks he is as good a fighter as anyone. After Tommy Hearns makes advances towards Gina, Martin challenges the boxer to a 10-round grudge match.

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Non-Frequent Flyer
programme.desc: Everything goes wrong that possibly could when Brown takes his first airplane flight. Later, Derek uses a case of mistaken identity to his advantage.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Shopaholic
programme.desc: Online shopping becomes an addiction for Cora; Brown starts digging for treasure in his backyard after finding an artifact.

programme.title: Black-ish: God
programme.desc: When Dre discovers that Zoey is questioning her belief in God, he undergoes a crisis of faith and leans on family members and coworkers for their input. Meanwhile, Bow's brother Johan comes to stay with the Johnsons.

programme.title: Black-ish: 40 Acres and a Vote
programme.desc: With Obama leaving office and the upcoming election, Dre finds a new candidate to believe in: Junior. Junior is running for class president and is overqualified for the job, but he just can't seem to connect with his fellow classmates.

programme.title: Black-ish: Who's Afraid of the Big Black Man
programme.desc: After a situation arises at work, Dre's views are confronted regarding how black people are perceived now versus when he grew up. He wants to be more open-minded about being a part of his community, so he joins the Homeowners' Association.

programme.title: Black-ish: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: When Jack and Diane bring home the results of their career tests, Dre and Bow must come to terms with the fact that Jack may have a blue-collar future. Meanwhile, Ruby is convinced Diane is possessed with a little help from Junior and Zoey.

programme.title: Black-ish: Auntsgiving
programme.desc: Pops' older sister, Almaviligerais, unexpectedly arrives for Thanksgiving, much to everyone's delight except Ruby, who can't stand her ex-sister-in-law.

programme.title: Black-ish: Being Bow-racial
programme.desc: Bow must address unresolved feelings about her own biracial identity when Junior brings home his first girlfriend, who happens to be white.

programme.title: Black-ish: Nothing But Nepotism
programme.desc: Bow urges Dre to use his connections and secure Zoey a fellowship, but he doesn't want his daughter relying on nepotism. When Bow finds Zoey a place at the hospital, Dre balks at the idea and successfully pulls some strings at Teen Vogue.

programme.title: Black-ish: Just Christmas, Baby
programme.desc: Zoey is college-bound, so Dre sets out to create the best family Christmas ever, even having Johan and his best friend Gigi over for the celebration. Meanwhile, Bow babysits Gigi's newborn and remembers just how difficult mothering a baby is.

programme.title: Movie: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters
programme.desc: When Camp Half-Blood is attacked and its protection compromised, Percy and his friends set off on a dangerous mission. They must recover the Golden Fleece from the Sea of Monsters in order to save their safe haven and stop an ancient evil from rising.

programme.title: Movie: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: An elite military unit, known as G.I. Joe, tracks the movements and developments of an evil organization. When a weapon is developed that uses nanotechnology, the Joes have to get the weapons back before it is used on the world.

programme.title: Movie: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: The team is terminated by the President's orders after being framed for crimes against the country. The surviving team members are forced to face off against Zartan, without their country backing them up.

programme.title: Futurama: The Birdbot of Ice-Catraz
programme.desc: The Planet Express crew is split up when Leela refuses to be a part of a controversial mission.

programme.title: Futurama: The Luck of the Fryrish
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck, Fry searches the ruins of Old New York for his lucky seven-leaf clover. When he can't find it, he concludes that his older brother, Yancy, stole the clover and took over his identity after he was frozen.

programme.title: Futurama: The Cyber House Rules
programme.desc: Leela reunites with a plastic surgeon that can give her two eyes; Bender wants to adopt.

programme.title: Futurama: Insane in the Mainframe
programme.desc: When Fry and Bender are mistaken for bank robbers, they are sentenced to an insane asylum.

programme.title: Futurama: Bendin' in the Wind
programme.desc: Bender no longer lives up to his name after an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Futurama: Time Keeps on Slippin'
programme.desc: The Professor creates a team of mutants to take on the legendary Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Movie: The Girl With All the Gifts
programme.desc: In the future, humanity is ravaged by a fungal disease that turns humans to zombies. After their base is attacked, a teacher escapes with an infected child being studied. Along with a scientist, they must traverse the dangerous country to safety.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Escape Clause
programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the Devil to endow him perfect health and immortality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lonely
programme.desc: A convicted murderer imprisoned on an asteroid is sent a unique, android companion.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Time Enough at Last
programme.desc: A busy bank teller wishes for time alone to read, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Perchance to Dream
programme.desc: A man has a recurring nightmare of a gorgeous woman luring him to death's bed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Judgement Night
programme.desc: A man finds himself on a British ship in the middle of a foggy night in 1942 and for some reason knows that the ship is doomed but no one will believe him. With time running out, he knows he holds his own fate.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: And When the Sky was Opened
programme.desc: After the first manned space flight in history, one astronaut disappears upon landing.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What You Need
programme.desc: A mysterious peddler gives customers exactly what they need to lead a better life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Four of Us Are Dying
programme.desc: A man with the ability to change his face gets in over his head.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Shot An Arrow Into the Air
programme.desc: Astronauts crash land and begin a fight for survival against each other.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hitch-hiker
programme.desc: A young lady heading on cross-country sees the same terrifying hitchhiker repeatedly.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fever
programme.desc: A man becomes obsessed with a slot machine during a trip to Las Vegas.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld
programme.desc: A vampire warrior finds herself falling in love with a human who has been bitten by a werewolf, the sworn enemies of her clan.

programme.title: Movie: Need for Speed
programme.desc: Two years after being framed and imprisoned for manslaughter, a blue-collar mechanic joins a cross-country car race in the hopes of exacting revenge. With a bounty placed on his car by the man who framed him, he must dodge the authorities at every turn.

programme.title: Movie: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A dispossessed band of Ronin seek out the help of an outcast to seek vengeance on a lord who killed their master.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Space in the Suburbs
programme.desc: San Diego transplants Mary and Dustyn are on the hunt for their family's dream home in Waco, Texas, and they're looking for a four-bedroom with a large yard and open space for hosting.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Traditional Goes Ultra Modern
programme.desc: A couple and their young son are moving to Waco from Denver, Colorado, in hopes of finding a slower pace, big acreage and a whole lot of style. Chip and Jo transform a country home into the modern dream they're looking for.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Colossal Crawford Reno
programme.desc: A California couple looks for a three-bedroom, two-bathroom house with an open floor plan and a big yard. Chip and Joanna work their magic on the home they choose, but it needs a total overhaul and is one of their biggest renos yet.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: From City Life in Pakistan to a Farmhouse in Waco
programme.desc: After 17 years of working and living abroad in Pakistan, a couple returns home to Waco and enlists Chip and Jo to help renovate an 1890's farmhouse they bought sight unseen.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: A Place to Relax and Space for Max in Emerald Isle, NC
programme.desc: Art and Susan have a long history of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina and now that they're searching for a home on the island, they'll have to consider what's best for their family, especially their 16-year-old son Max.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Difference of Opinion on the Delaware Bay
programme.desc: Jeremy and Jennifer are in search of a beach house along the shores of the Delaware Bay. While they agree on where they want to spend their summer weekends, they can't agree on the size of the property.

programme.title: Off the Grid on the Beach: Country Living to Beach Front Sitting
programme.desc: A couple with busy lives is looking to find a home on the beach in Belize where they can spend time together without distractions. To get the privacy they want, they must take jeeps, boats and catamarans to find their perfect paradise.

programme.title: Off the Grid on the Beach: Sunshine State to Beachfront Escape
programme.desc: Two veteran divers are looking to get off the beaten path and find a completely sustainable home for their family in Tahiti. They must take planes, barges and even scuba dive to find a property with the privacy they desire.

programme.title: Hot Properties: San Diego: Beach Bungalows and Western Estates
programme.desc: Builder Andrew White must rally his team to finish a beach bungalow, or Seth and Mia risk losing the buyer. Mia creates a one-of-a-kind open house and Seth brings in high-end brokers in hopes of selling a Wild West-themed estate.

programme.title: House Hunters International: See Ya in Gandia
programme.desc: A Brit that stayed stateside after college wants to return to her side of the pond with her husband and kids. They settle on Gandia, Spain, but while he wants to downsize in the city center, she envisions a Spanish villa with an English garden.

programme.title: House Hunters: Budget Battle in Palm Springs
programme.desc: West Hollywood buyers are looking for a weekend retreat in Palm Springs, California. One wants a lush yard for entertaining, and the other wants room for visiting family. However, when it comes to the budget, they have different ideas.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Worlds Collide in Accra, Ghana
programme.desc: An engaged couple moves to Accra, Ghana, to live together for the first time. He's lived in Africa before and is open to anything. She is more particular about their housing, and launching a new start up means he doesn't want to fund fancy things.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Colorado Cabin Quest Along the Rocky Mountain Foothills
programme.desc: A city-dwelling couple wants to trade bumper-to-bumper traffic for a home where they can raise their two kids immersed in nature seven days a week. They look in the foothills surrounding the little mining town of Cripple Creek for a log cabin.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Alaska Cabin Hunt
programme.desc: A couple and their three-year-old daughter search for a cabin with unparalleled views and access to the great outdoors near Fairbanks, Alaska.

programme.title: Home Town: A Vacation Every Day
programme.desc: A couple is moving their family of five inland for a new job. They are looking for a large home with architectural details and space for their three kids. Their budget goes a long way as they consider a 5,000-square-foot brick beauty.

programme.title: Home Town: Putting Down Roots
programme.desc: After falling in love with the small-town energy and hospitality, a couple that was recently recruited by the local hospital looks for a place to live as they start their new jobs as doctors.

programme.title: Home Town: Countryside in the City
programme.desc: A couple is ready for a different pace after living in the country for years. They're hoping to find a historic home that lets them hold onto the countryside with a spacious garden. Ben and Erin show them two very different options.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Coastal Style
programme.desc: With an all-in budget of $300,000, a couple is ready to move back home to Mississippi and put down roots after years of moving for work. They need help finding a home with charm and character in a small town.

programme.title: Home Town: So Long Loft, Hello Home
programme.desc: A family of four has outgrown their loft and is ready to use their all-in budget of $200,000 to move into an family home with a yard. Ben and Erin show the parents two family-friendly houses, including a dated, boxy home with 14 acres of property.

programme.title: Love It or List It: New Kid on the Block
programme.desc: When new parents Ryan and Ashley bought their home, it was in a desirable neighbourhood but it was the worst house on the block. They got it for a great price, but of course, it needed a ton of renovations.

programme.desc: After ditching suburban space to join his wife Marci in her charming but tiny home, Matt quickly began feeling buried.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Family Contemplates Financial or Emotional Investments in Their Home
programme.desc: A family considers a financial or emotional investment.

programme.desc: A desperate mother uncovers a shocking secret about her family's new home after she discovers the nursery is haunted. A woman's dream home turns into a living nightmare when she encounters a dark presence that refuses to leave.

programme.title: My Horror Story: The Devil Inside
programme.desc: A man is horrified to learn he is the target of a biblical demon that will stop at nothing to possess his soul. A ghostly woman steps out of a young artist's dreams and into reality.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Run, Ghost Boy, Run
programme.desc: A college track star learns there are some things he can't run from when an evil entity attacks him in his dorm room. A security guard encounters a terrifying creature from Native American lore.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Night Terrors
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy is thrilled to have his own room in a new home until he meets the demonic entity residing there. A woman wonders if her nightmares are connected to her difficulty conceiving, or a more horrific truth.

programme.title: The Dead Files: House of Darkness and The Killing Fields
programme.desc: Steve and Amy help a family being torn apart by menacing entities in their Alabama home. They then head to Nebraska, where a woman believes the dark spirits lurking in her home have taken possession of her husband.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Revealed: Double Jeopardy - Santa Paula, California

programme.title: Black-ish: Plus Two Isn't a Thing
programme.desc: Dre's childhood best friend Gigi Franklin is in town, and Bow feels like an afterthought whenever the two of them are together. Dre and Gigi are like brother and sister, but it doesn’t help that Gigi is an international pop star with model looks.

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger
programme.desc: Dre has never had a problem with Pops dating, but when it comes to Ruby, he won't let anyone come between them. When Ruby invites Dre and Bow to meet the new man in her life, Dre immediately goes on the defensive and finds any reason to dislike him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Keeping Up With the Johnsons
programme.desc: After a month of heavy spending, Dre and Bow start to question if they are living too large and try to become more financially responsible.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: After Dre notices that his neighbour Janine has never invited his family to any of her pool parties, he assumes she is racially stereotyping them as a family that doesn't swim. The kids are shocked to find out that, in fact, Dre doesn’t know how to swim.

programme.title: Movie: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: Smurfette, the only female Smurf, feels like no one understands her. She encounters a creature like her who drops a map with directions to a Lost Village. She sets out with her friends to find the village and must get there before the evil Gargamel.

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: The story of the ultimate castaways who succeeded against all odds.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: The greatest shipwreck of all time reveals the lengths animals that reside in the ocean go to for survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes
programme.desc: The birth, growth, and death of an island in the Pacific ocean. Featuring images of an erupting underwater volcano and rivers of lava below the waves.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Strange Islands
programme.desc: The evolution of wildlife in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: In a land of beauty and peril, the dramatic lives and fortunes of its animals are inexorably bound together. Intimate and emotional, epic and engaging, 'Yellowstone' reveals the grandeur of this amazing place as its animals struggle to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As the snow melts, the extent of Yellowstone is revealed. Grizzly bears teach their young how to hunt fish and when to move out through valleys and grasslands into summer forests and up into the peaks. But summer here is fickle.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary
programme.desc: Sue Perkins travels to Chimp Haven, the US national chimpanzee sanctuary in Louisiana, to visit six female ex-laboratory chimpanzees starting retirement.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the 20,000 islands and inhibit the Pacific ocean. Narrated by Benedict Cumberbatch.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Summer

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
